title: The AOC 16T35 portable monitor is down to $60 at Best Buy — and it's better than the model we gave 4.5 stars
summary: This 3.3lb portable monitor has a built-in kickstand for portrait and landscape viewing, features a 1920x1080 resolution, two 1W speakers, two USB-C ports, a single 3.5mm audio jack, and one mini HDMI port.
